content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(5, 9, 0), (1, 5, 1), (0, 7, 5), (0, 3, 6), (0, 4, 7), (2, 5, 7), (4, 7, 9), (8, 9, 9), (4, 5, 10), (2, 3, 12), (6, 8, 17), (1, 3, 18), (2, 7, 18), (3, 5, 19), (4, 6, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 17.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (5, 9, 0) has node 5 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 5, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 7, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 3, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 4, 7) has node 0 and time 7. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 5, 7) has node 2 and time 7. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 7, 9) has node 4 and time 9. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (8, 9, 9) has node 8 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 10) has node 4 and time 10. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 3, 12) has node 2 and time 12. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (6, 8, 17) has node 6 and time 17. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 3, 18) has node 1 and time 18. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 7, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 5, 19) has node 3 and time 19. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 6, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 6.

The nodes matched are 5, 7, 9, 18, and 19.

Answer: [5, 7, 9, 18, 19]
